# Mask and localize tensor-parallel expert indices

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/mask_indices_by_tp_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/mask_indices_by_tp_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `mask_indices_by_tp` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="mask_indices_by_tp_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int TileM = 16>
void mask_indices_by_tp(std::int32_t *indices, std::int32_t per_gpu,
                        std::int32_t per_dp, std::int32_t num_tp_ranks,
                        std::int32_t tp_rank) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0, "NumTopk must be multiple of 8");
    constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileM;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
    using tile = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using it = global_iterator<gm, tile>;
    it idx_iter(indices);
    for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
        auto gidx = idx_iter(tm, 0);
        tile idx, q, r, local, dp, adj, result, mask_rank, mask_ge0, is_ok;
        TLOAD(idx, gidx);

        TDIVS(q, idx, per_gpu);
        TREMS(r, q, num_tp_ranks);

        tile tp_bc; TEXPANDS(tp_bc, tp_rank);
        TCMP(mask_rank, r, tp_bc);

        TSUBS(local, idx, tp_rank * per_gpu);
        TDIVS(dp, local, per_dp);
        TMULS(adj, dp, per_dp - per_gpu);
        TSUB(local, local, adj);

        tile zero, signbit, sign; TEXPANDS(zero, 0); TEXPANDS(signbit, static_cast<std::int32_t>(0x80000000));
        TAND(sign, local, signbit);
        TCMP(mask_ge0, sign, zero);
        TAND(is_ok, mask_rank, mask_ge0);

        TEXPANDS(result, -1);
        TSEL(result, is_ok, local);
        auto gout = idx_iter(tm, 0);
        TSTORE(gout, result);
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TAND`](../../../intrinsics/tand.md), [`TCMP`](../../../intrinsics/tcmp.md), [`TDIVS`](../../../intrinsics/tdivs.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TREMS`](../../../intrinsics/trems.md), [`TSEL`](../../../intrinsics/tsel.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md), [`TSUB`](../../../intrinsics/tsub.md), [`TSUBS`](../../../intrinsics/tsubs.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

    #ifndef SUPERNPU_MASK_INDICES_BY_TP_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_MASK_INDICES_BY_TP_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int TileM = 16>
    void mask_indices_by_tp(std::int32_t *indices, std::int32_t per_gpu,
                            std::int32_t per_dp, std::int32_t num_tp_ranks,
                            std::int32_t tp_rank) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0, "NumTopk must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileM;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
        using tile = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using it = global_iterator<gm, tile>;
        it idx_iter(indices);
        for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
            auto gidx = idx_iter(tm, 0);
            tile idx, q, r, local, dp, adj, result, mask_rank, mask_ge0, is_ok;
            TLOAD(idx, gidx);

            TDIVS(q, idx, per_gpu);
            TREMS(r, q, num_tp_ranks);

            tile tp_bc; TEXPANDS(tp_bc, tp_rank);
            TCMP(mask_rank, r, tp_bc);

            TSUBS(local, idx, tp_rank * per_gpu);
            TDIVS(dp, local, per_dp);
            TMULS(adj, dp, per_dp - per_gpu);
            TSUB(local, local, adj);

            tile zero, signbit, sign; TEXPANDS(zero, 0); TEXPANDS(signbit, static_cast<std::int32_t>(0x80000000));
            TAND(sign, local, signbit);
            TCMP(mask_ge0, sign, zero);
            TAND(is_ok, mask_rank, mask_ge0);

            TEXPANDS(result, -1);
            TSEL(result, is_ok, local);
            auto gout = idx_iter(tm, 0);
            TSTORE(gout, result);
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
